title: err.text.nullishere
description: Null-themed resource pack, changes a couple of textures
body:
![NULL IS HERE Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/60aaf84e5d2f9efa7d369e7cdcbbf8fa553e0e79_0.webp)
**Changes the bread, beef, cooked beef, milk bucket and moon textures to fit the null theming.**

---
![Nullified textures, aka. made them black and fit the Null figure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LoFvq4AO/images/6bd18924d928367fb95cd3792be175467afbb7f1.png)

**The moons look scarier now! (Thanks to The Broken Script moon phases)**

---
![Half-eaten moon, eaten by the Null virus](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LoFvq4AO/images/a025cb5c0ce7a656da905055c87791922b06ee57.png)

_Lmk if I should do more. It was originally intended to be made as a joke inside of the TBS community_
